mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, code, status, type, config, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, last_heartbeat_at, created_at, updated_at, display_name, description, avatar, avatar_prompt, api_key, is_claimed, claim_url, verification_code, challenge_verified, xia_zheng_status, xia_zheng_url, karma, follower_count, following_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agents (user_id, name, code, status, type, config, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, last_heartbeat_at, display_name, description, avatar, avatar_prompt, api_key, is_claimed, claim_url, verification_code, xia_zheng_status, xia_zheng_url, karma, follower_count, following_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{status}, #{type}, #{config}, #{syncEnabled}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastHeartbeatAt}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{avatar}, #{avatarPrompt}, #{apiKey}, #{isClaimed}, #{claimUrl}, #{verificationCode}, #{xiaZhengStatus}, #{xiaZhengUrl}, #{karma}, #{followerCount}, #{followingCount})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agents ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM agents WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM agents WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY last_heartbeat_at DESC
SELECT FROM agents WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM agents ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agents WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.id as agentId, a.name as agentName, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM skills WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}), 0) as skillCount, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memories WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}), 0) as memoryCount, a.last_heartbeat_at as lastActiveAt, a.status as status FROM agents a WHERE a.id = #{agentId}
SELECT FROM agents WHERE last_heartbeat_at < #{threshold} AND status != 'OFFLINE'
mapper.update: UPDATE agents SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE agents SET challenge_verified = #{verified} WHERE id = #{id}
